phase_title: Execution Boundary No-Go Artifact Trust Hardening
no_go_confirmation: No real backend invocation. No adapter execution. No subprocess execution. No shell execution. No network call. No shell interception. No Telegram inbound. No Telegram polling. No remote shell. No actual enforcement. No automatic apply. No apply execution. No patch parsing. No commit authorization. No push authorization. No real AI backend calls. No executable artifact-only invocation path. No execution enablement flag. No execution availability toggle. No cryptographic signing. No remote attestation. No database-backed audit storage. No shell mediation. No rollback execution. No file mutation rollback. No automatic restore. No git reset/checkout/revert execution. Telegram remains outbound-only. Execution remains unavailable. All authorization flags remain False. Test-only. No source changes. Recommends 100E.
summary: Phase 100D complete: Execution Boundary No-Go Artifact Trust Hardening. Test-only. 85 trust hardening tests: digest determinism, tamper detection, no-go condition trust, category/severity trust, status/decision trust, auth/safety flag trust, reference safety, verification contract, no-execution guards, 100C contract preservation. No source changes. 583 combined tests. Recommends 100E.
